zh.lifeSummary: 當Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail於1454年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie56歲，母親Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail20歲。他於1470年與Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1491年2月7日在英國蘇格蘭希倫德享年37歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail于1454年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie56岁，母亲Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail20岁。他于1470年与Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh在英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1491年2月7日在英国苏格兰希倫德享年37岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

variants.name: Kennith
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail was born in 1454, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, was 56 and his mother, Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, was 20. He married Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh in 1470, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 7 February 1491, in Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail est né en 1454, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh en 1470, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 7 février 1491, à Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail 1454 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie 56 und seine Mutter Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail 20. Er hat 1470 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 7. Februar 1491 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail è nato il nel 1454 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh nel 1470, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 febbraio 1491, nel Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintailが1454年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzieは56歳，母Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintailは20歳であった。1470年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでLady Finola MacDonald of Lochalshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1491年2月7日にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドで37歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドビーウリービーウリー プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail(이)가 1454년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1491년 2월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 보리 보리 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail nasceu em 1454, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh em 1470, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1491, em Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail родился в 1454 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh в 1470 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 7 февраля 1491 г. в местности хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности болы приори, болы, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail nació en 1454, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Anna Margaret MacDougall Baroness of Kintail, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Finola MacDonald of Lochalsh en 1470, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1491, en Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido.
